questions.question: Which dentists in Houston Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Dentists in Houston Tx with weekend hours include: Floss Dental (Sat: off), Sweetpea Smiles (Sat: open "By appointment only"), Eco Dental (Sat: 09:00-15:00), Marconi Dental Aesthetics - Pasadena, TX (Sat: 09:00-16:00), Smile Avenue Family Dentistry of Katy (Sat: 07:00-16:00), Smile Image Dentists (Sat: 09:00-14:00), Coleman Dental (Sat: off), Dental Bright (Sat: 09:00-15:00) and 14 more. 22 total with weekend availability.
